page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the ecs.d1ne family, powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, 128.0 GB of RAM providing 4.0 GB per core, and a massive 70866 GB of local HDD storage. The system operates on a KVM hypervisor and supports a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-threaded and multi-threaded capabilities. Single-core stress-ng performance and single-threaded gzip compression are weak to poor, falling into the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, reaches average tiers. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks, along with PassMark CPU and memory scores, consistently registers in the middle 50% of benchmarked systems.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server offers a high density of local HDD storage relative to its compute and memory resources, making it a specialized option for workloads requiring massive storage capacity without the premium cost of SSDs. The hardware profile is well-suited for large-scale data storage, database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded processing tasks that can leverage the 32 dedicated cores, while it is less optimal for single-threaded or high-speed sequential write-heavy applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is a storage-focused server powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 128.0 GB of RAM. It features an exceptionally large local storage capacity of 70866 GB HDD and a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While single-core benchmarks and single-threaded compression tasks perform poorly, multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations achieve average performance tiers. This server is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring massive local storage capacity paired with moderate multi-threaded compute resources, making it suitable for large-scale data archiving, distributed databases, and static web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c8d3.8xlarge is a storage-focused server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 70866 GB of local HDD storage for large-scale data workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity local storage server featuring dedicated multi-core processing and balanced memory bandwidth for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
Massive 70866 GB of local HDD storage capacity
128.0 GB of RAM providing 4.0 GB per core
Best suited for large-scale data archiving, databases, and static web serving
